channel.title: Delaware Beach Finds
channel.description: Delaware beach guides, Mid-Atlantic finds and useful local shopping.

item.title: Which Delaware Beach Town Fits Your Vibe? Rehoboth vs. Dewey vs. Bethany vs. Lewes vs. Fenwick
item.description: Compare Delaware beach towns by atmosphere, nightlife, family fit, walkability, quiet, food and weekend style before choosing where to stay.

item.title: 27 Cool Things to Do at the Delaware Beaches Beyond Sitting on the Sand
item.description: Discover outdoor adventures, history, wildlife, food, bike routes, boardwalk moments and under-the-radar things to do near Delaware beaches.

item.title: Cape Henlopen State Park Day Trip: A No-Wasted-Motion Guide
item.description: Plan a Cape Henlopen State Park day trip with beaches, trails, Fort Miles, observation towers, fishing pier stops and practical timing.

item.title: Rainy Day at the Delaware Beaches: How to Save the Weekend
item.description: A practical rainy-day Delaware beach plan with museums, shopping, food, scenic drives, creative stops and weather-flexible itineraries.

item.title: The Delaware Beach Packing List That Prevents the Annoying Mistakes
item.description: Pack smarter for Delaware beaches with a practical checklist for sun, wind, sand, kids, food, electronics and a faster beach setup.

item.title: Cape May from Delaware: Turn the Ferry into the Best Part of the Day Trip
item.description: Plan a Cape May day trip from Lewes using the Cape May–Lewes Ferry, with timing, walk-on versus car decisions and a realistic itinerary.

item.title: Assateague and Ocean City in One Road Trip: Wild Coast First, Boardwalk Second
item.description: Combine Assateague Island and Ocean City, Maryland, in a balanced road trip from Delaware with wildlife, beach time and boardwalk energy.

item.title: A 48-Hour Delaware Beach Weekend That Does Not Feel Rushed
item.description: Use this Friday-to-Sunday Delaware beach itinerary for a balanced weekend with beach time, Cape Henlopen, town walks and flexible dining.

item.title: Best Delaware Beach Gifts: Local Pride Without the Generic Souvenir Energy
item.description: Find Delaware beach gift ideas including personalized beach-house pieces, local prints, digital trip gifts, apparel and useful coastal products.

item.title: Hidden-Gem Delmarva: Small Stops Worth Leaving the Main Road For
item.description: Explore slower Delmarva ideas including bay towns, marsh views, historic streets, wildlife stops and local detours across Delaware and Maryland.
